_comment: Source of truth for the component library page. Files in dist/ are auto-discovered; this file adds the human bits (name, description, usage, docs). Add an entry keyed by the component's file basename. Omit an entry and the component still appears with embed tags only. Set hidden:true to suppress (e.g. stubs).

searchbar.name: CMS Searchbar
searchbar.description: Client-side search over a Webflow CMS collection. Fetches once, caches in localStorage, filters in-browser. Enter is blocked so Webflow's search page never hijacks it.

glossary.name: Glossary Renderer
glossary.description: Renders a CMS collection as an A–Z accordion glossary, with a built-in loading spinner that clears itself when content arrives.
glossary.dependsOn: Requires the CMS Searchbar script — it uses WebflowCMS to load the data.

modal.name: Modal
modal.description: Accessible modal engine. Auto-injects the close button (no need to add one per modal), closes on overlay click, Esc, or any [data-paz-modal-close]. Open via a data attribute or PazModal.open('id').
modal.usage: Your content here…

carousel.name: Carousel
carousel.description: Touch-enabled slider with autoplay, infinite loop, dots, and responsive breakpoints.
carousel.note: No public init is exposed yet (defines initSlider() internally). Not drop-in ready — wiring pending.

tabs.name: Tabs
tabs.description: Accessible tabbed panels, matched by ORDER — the Nth .paz-tab button shows the Nth .paz-tab-panel, so no ids or data attributes to maintain. First tab opens by default (or mark one with data-paz-default). Arrow keys move between tabs (Home/End jump to ends); panels fade in. Style everything yourself — the script only toggles an is-active class on the active tab + panel and a built-in fade.
tabs.usage:
Plans Claims
Plans content…
Claims content…
